tagline: Navigate the calmest path, not just the fastest.

designSystem.style: Clean, calming mobile navigation UI with a vibrant mint-green brand palette built around a nature-inspired ethos. Features smooth card-based layouts, soft gradient accents, circular calm-score rings, SVG street map visualization with zone overlays, and gentle micro-interactions. Dual light/dark themes with deep forest-dark and fresh-white-green light modes.
